videos.title: Where Are Humans ACTUALLY From?
videos.author: SciShow
videos.description:
We know humans evolved in Africa. But that's a big place, so do we know where on this massive continent our ancestors first became, well, us? Let's unpack the evidence by talking about the oldest known lineage of humans and track their and our migration all across Africa and the world.
